author: Dana Edwards
status: candidate process control; no protocol, conformance, release, or production claim

handoff.rule: All architectural-closure tasks complete with evidence and no unresolved decision.

entry: Read applicable specification, RFC, contracts, CBCs, tests, and authority map.
Write failing tests or exact vectors first.
stop: Stop on unapproved canonical ABI or public authority API change.
Stop on oracle disagreement, UNKNOWN, nondeterminism, or unclassified counterexample.
